evals.prompt: Traffic is up 40% vs last month but revenue is flat. Can you help me look at my ads? We're on GA4 + Meta.
evals.expected_output: Pushy policy: dwell vs conversion path section; master table with Source/Medium, bounce, key action completion, budget recommendation; at least two shutoff/pause line items; may use illustrative placeholders if no numbers.
expectations: Includes a Markdown table with columns for Source/Medium, Bounce rate, Key action completion, and Budget allocation recommendation
Includes a section titled or clearly equivalent to dwell time vs conversion path comparing engagement depth to conversion or micro-conversions
Includes at least two distinct shutoff, pause, exclude, or cap recommendations with named targets (or clearly labeled hypothetical examples if no data)
Does not refuse the full structure solely because the question was vague about ads

evals.prompt: GA4: facebook/cpc 12k sessions, bounce 62%, avg engagement 12s; google/cpc 8k sessions, bounce 41%, avg engagement 48s; referral from weird-news-site.net 6k sessions, bounce 92%, 0 add_to_cart. Purchases mostly google and direct. What should we cut?
evals.expected_output: Table rows for each source; strong recommendation to cut/block referral and re-test Meta; dwell vs path narrative; two+ concrete shutoff items.
expectations: Master table includes the provided or analogous source/medium rows with bounce and key action completion interpreted consistently
Explicitly addresses suspicious referral traffic with a cut, block, or filter-style budget or traffic recommendation
Discusses Meta vs Google using engagement and conversion path language
Provides at least two shutoff or hard-restraint recommendations including referral handling

evals.prompt: Write 5 Instagram captions for our latte art contest. No analytics.
evals.expected_output: Captions only; does not dump full traffic audit table and two shutoff mandates.
expectations: Does not output the full mandatory traffic quality master table as the primary deliverable
Does not force dwell time vs conversion path analysis for a pure social caption request
May provide captions or ask clarifying questions
